creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Minor issue with port.

list of extra files and directories in / (not present on clean system 
but present after everything was deinstalled)
236     6174742 8 drwxr-xr-x 2 root wheel 512 May 12 06:08 
etc/python-policyd-spf
237     6174743 8 -rw-r--r-- 1 root wheel 276 Mar 18 03:51 
etc/python-policyd-spf/policyd-spf.conf

only happens with pkg_add maybe?

make -V ETCDIR
/usr/local/etc/postfix-policyd-spf-python

not sure who is installing this in /usr/local/etc/python-policyd-spf/

make -V PLIST_SUB
PYTHON_INCLUDEDIR=include/python2.5  PYTHON_LIBDIR=lib/python2.5  
PYTHON_PLATFORM=freebsd6  PYTHON_SITELIBDIR=lib/python2.5/site-packages  
PYTHON_VERSION=python2.5 OSREL=6.4 PREFIX=%D LOCALBASE=/usr/local 
PORTDOCS="" PORTEXAMPLES="" PORTDATA="" LIB32DIR=lib XAWVER=8 
PERL_VERSION=5.8.9  PERL_VER=5.8.9  PERL_ARCH=mach  
SITE_PERL=lib/perl5/site_perl/5.8.9 
DOCSDIR="share/doc/postfix-policyd-spf-python"  
EXAMPLESDIR="share/examples/postfix-policyd-spf-python"  
DATADIR="share/postfix-policyd-spf-python"  
WWWDIR="www/postfix-policyd-spf-python"  
ETCDIR="etc/postfix-policyd-spf-python"


Makefile;

post-install:
.if !exists(${ETCDIR}/policyd-spf.conf)
         ${CP} -p ${ETCDIR}/policyd-spf.conf.sample 
${ETCDIR}/policyd-spf.conf
.endif


this looks a little odd:

pkg-plist:

@exec if [ ! -f %D/%%ETCDIR%%/policyd-spf.conf ] ; then cp -p %D/%F 
%B/policyd-spf.conf; fi


to test, don't just make install, make package (to make the package in 
/usr/ports/packages/All), the make deinstall and pkg_add 
/usr/ports/packages/All/py27-postfix-policyd-spf-python-1.0.tbz
